title: APEX Supabase Deployment Utility And Env Helper Review
objective: Review the remaining Supabase deployment-utility and environment-helper slice from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan and classify each artifact as app-owned candidate, ops-owned candidate, lineage-only retention, archive-only residue, or defer-pending-boundary-definition without physically moving any files or promoting any executable helper into an active deployment lane.
dependency_note: Packet 001f closed the archive and residue routing tranche. Packet 001g exists because the remaining Supabase deployment helpers are mixed executable artifacts without an approved target boundary or ownership home.
constrained_outputs: A planning-only review handoff for the remaining Supabase deployment-utility and environment-helper slice
A per-file disposition for .env.example, deploy.ps1, DEPLOY_*.sql, and lib/supabase.ts
A bounded recommendation for the smallest next packet or an explicit defer decision if no safe movement lane is ready
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001g remains planning-only and does not move executable helpers into active homes
Confirm packet 001g assigns an explicit disposition for each remaining helper artifact
Confirm packet 001g distinguishes app-owned, ops-owned, lineage-only, archive-only, and defer outcomes instead of treating the slice as one block
Confirm packet 001g recommends the smallest next packet without forcing movement by momentum
sql_permission_note: Packet 001g is a planning-only boundary review. It does not authorize movement, SQL execution, runtime edits, environment activation, or deployment changes.
